title: Conversational Mechanics — Tier 2 Tactical Vocabulary
summary: Fifteen conversational mechanisms renamed out of old mentalism language into working vocabulary. Each placed inside the Map/Mirror/Align/Share/Define architecture with deployment examples. Ethical posture baked in: inference at safe distance not flex, contrast for coordinates not cornering, shared opposition only when real, frame questions for clarity not winning, next-step for motion not pressure. Mechanisms are morally neutral; posture is what keeps their use clean.
